interactive.title: Interactive Services
interactive.desc: Make effective use of the university's interactive services!

talim.title: Education
talim.desc: A thought that receives good education becomes as sharp as a dagger or diamond.

student.title: Student Life
student.desc: The university provides many opportunities for students to spend their time meaningfully.

centers.title: Research Centers
centers.desc: Making discoveries is important for our world, health, and intellectual life.

alumni.title: Honorary Alumni
alumni.desc: Today, many university graduates hold leadership positions in Uzbekistan's ministries, agencies, and legislative bodies, and are successfully working in leading international organizations and large companies around the world.

about.title: About Transport University
about.desc: The system for training highly qualified personnel for the republic's transport sector has been fundamentally improved based on advanced foreign experience and international standards, by widely introducing innovative teaching methods and modern pedagogical and information technologies into the educational process, as well as strengthening the material and technical base and increasing the scientific potential of sectoral educational institutions.

footer.title: Transport University
footer.desc: Students are our main strength. Therefore, if we want to introduce something new at our university, we always consult with them.
